items.title: Andrew in custody as police search two addresses
items.description: The former prince remains in custody while searches take place in Norfolk and Berkshire.

items.title: Man guilty of XL bully offence after dog killed mother-in-law in his home
items.description: Ashley Warren, the first person to be prosecuted under XL bully laws, will be sentenced in April.

items.title: Starmer appoints Dame Antonia Romeo as head of UK civil service
items.description: Dame Antonia will be the first woman to hold the post and replaces Sir Chris Wormald as the UK's top civil servant.

items.title: Andrew arrest and UN fact-finding mission in Sudan
items.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor is in custody over his links to the late Jeffrey Epstein

items.title: Are Arsenal in danger of repeating history?
items.description: Arsenal's disappointing 2-2 draw at Wolves on Wednesday has similarities to what happened to the Gunners 18 years ago.
